definition.title: Document Formatter
definition.description: Format a document based on the selected output style.

steps.title: Format Document
steps.content:
Take the following content and reformat it:

{{content}}

steps.label: 1a
steps.title: Formal Formatting
steps.content:
Rewrite the content above in a formal, professional style:
- Use third person perspective
- Avoid contractions
- Use precise, technical vocabulary
- Structure with clear headings and numbered lists

steps.label: 1b
steps.title: Casual Formatting
steps.content:
Rewrite the content above in a friendly, conversational style:
- Use first or second person perspective
- Contractions are fine
- Keep sentences short and punchy
- Use bullet points and informal headings

steps.title: Final Review
steps.content: Review the formatted document for consistency and completeness. Fix any issues and output the final version.
